headline: Global AI sell-off batters chip names
detail: Tech and chip stocks are under broad selling pressure today from an AI-driven unwind. This hits your entire book hard - AVGO, SMH, CRWD, and PLTR are all in the crossfire. On margin, a sector-wide down day like this compounds losses faster than any single stock move.

headline: Micron jumps 10% on memory crunch revenue surge
detail: Micron's blowout quarter shows the memory side of chips is booming on tight supply. This is a potential positive signal for semiconductor sentiment broadly, which could offer some relief to SMH and AVGO if the mood shifts. Watch whether it puts a floor under chip names today or gets swallowed by the broader sell-off.

headline: Hidden PCE triggers could force a Fed rate hike
detail: If PCE data surprises hot and rate-hike fears return, growth and tech stocks get hit with a double whammy - lower valuations and tighter liquidity. Your book is 90% in names that are most sensitive to rate moves. This is a macro risk worth tracking closely this week.

headline: SpaceX 'investment coma' drives space ETF toward worst month in 6 years
detail: This speaks directly to your SPCX and SPAL positions. The space ETF complex is under serious pressure, and SPAL's 2x leverage means it's amplifying every down day. SPCX is a brand-new IPO with thin data - if the sector is in its worst stretch in six years, both positions deserve tight manual management right now.
